name: SAKO E-SUN 3KVA 24V Off Grid Hybrid Inverter
description:
The 
SAKO E-SUN 3KVA 24V Off Grid Hybrid Inverter
 represents the definitive pinnacle of hybrid power technology, expertly engineered to provide seamless, reliable, and high-capacity electrical backup. Classified as a multi-function inverter/charger, this unit skillfully combines the indispensable roles of a robust inverter, an intelligent MPPT solar charge controller, and a versatile battery charger into one robust, compact, and aesthetically pleasing chassis. It is the ideal, high-capacity solution for larger residential settings, demanding small office environments, or light commercial operations in regions, like Bangladesh, characterized by inconsistent utility power and a growing reliance on renewable energy sources. This model’s powerful output and advanced features solidify its position as a top-tier choice for securing energy independence.
High Capacity and Pure Sine Wave Output (3000VA / 2500W)
This specific model delivers a formidable continuous power output of 
3000VA / 2500W
 while operating on an efficient 
24V DC battery system
. This higher voltage configuration is optimally suited for minimizing internal current draw, significantly reducing losses across cables, and maximizing overall system efficiency in high-power applications. This robust capacity ensures that you can power a wide array of appliances simultaneously—from standard lighting and fans to energy-intensive equipment such as dedicated AC units (within capacity limits), refrigerators, and water pumps.
Crucially, the output is strictly 
Pure Sine Wave
. This means the electricity generated is clean, stable, and perfectly identical in quality to that supplied by the public utility grid. This uncompromising power quality is vital for safeguarding all connected appliances, particularly sensitive electronics (like computers, modern televisions, and diagnostic equipment) and high-inductance motor loads. Using Pure Sine Wave power protects these valuable assets from the operational stress, overheating, and damage often associated with the less refined output of modified sine wave inverters, thereby extending their operational lifespan and minimizing replacement costs.
Revolutionizing Energy Harvest with Advanced MPPT Technology
The core of the SAKO E-SUN 3KVA’s high solar efficiency is the integrated 
Maximum Power Point Tracking (MPPT) solar charge controller
. This technology represents a significant leap over older Pulse Width Modulation (PWM) methods. The MPPT controller constantly scans the photovoltaic (PV) array’s electrical characteristics to precisely locate and operate at the point where maximum power can be extracted, ensuring an impressive efficiency rate that often exceeds 98%. This results in you harvesting more power from your solar panels throughout the day.
The unit boasts a remarkably 
Wide PV Input Range of 30Vdc to 400Vdc
  granting substantial flexibility in solar array design. This wide range simplifies installation and allows for more cost-effective string sizing across rooftops of varying sizes and orientations. A vital feature for maximizing power yield during marginal hours is its low start-up capability: the inverter is designed so that 
Only 1pcs 36V solar panel can start the solar inverter
, guaranteeing effective charging initiation even under minimal solar irradiance or during the challenging transition periods of dawn and dusk. This maximized daily energy yield directly translates into faster battery charging and greater long-term operational cost savings.
Intelligent Customization and Versatile Battery Integration
The SAKO E-SUN 3.0KW is designed for modern users who demand precise, granular control over their energy usage. Control over the system is managed through a comprehensive LCD display and user-friendly control buttons. This interface allows for highly personalized energy management settings:
Configurable Charger Priority:
 Users can easily set the system to prioritize charging from the solar array (maximizing the use of free, renewable energy) or revert to using the AC utility/generator source (ensuring the batteries are always topped up).
Battery Chemistry Compatibility:
 Utilizing a smart battery charger design, the unit is fully compatible with a diverse range of battery chemistries, including traditional flooded, AGM, and Gel batteries, as well as the powerful and long-lasting 
Lithium-ion (LiFePo4) batteries
. This future-proof compatibility ensures the system remains relevant as energy storage technology advances.
Adjustable Charging Current:
 The charging current can be precisely configured to optimally match the specific capacity and health of the connected battery bank, a feature crucial for optimizing battery health and extending its service life.
Input Range Flexibility:
 The unit allows users to set different acceptable AC input voltage ranges for either sensitive loads (UPS Mode) or standard appliances, tailoring protection precisely to the load requirement.
Uncompromising Reliability, Safety, and Connectivity
Reliability is a cornerstone of the SAKO E-SUN 3.0KVA’s design. The system is engineered to seamlessly manage power input from both the 
mains utility and a generator
, providing flexible and reliable options for battery replenishment.
Safety is paramount, with comprehensive features built in:
Protection Suite:
 Integrated safeguards against 
Overload, Over temperature, and Short circuit protection
 ensure both the longevity of the inverter and the safety of all connected loads.
Operational Continuity:
 Key features include 
Auto restart while AC is recovering
 for hands-free transition back to grid power, and a 
Cold Start function
, which allows the inverter to be powered on directly from the batteries even when no external AC input is present.
Optional Monitoring:
 For sophisticated users, the SAKO E-SUN 3.0KW supports optional 
WIFI/GPRS monitoring
, enabling remote access to system status, historical data, and setting adjustments via a smartphone or PC, providing unparalleled oversight of your power system.
Product Features
MPPT Solar Charge Controller Inside
Wide PV Input Range 30-400Vdc
Smart battery protection. Compatible with LiFePo4
Configurable battery & AC/Solar priority via LCD setting
Reliable quality, economic design
Only 1pcs 36V solar panel can start solar inverter
Pure Sine Wave Output
Auto restart while AC is recovering
Cold Start function
Compatible with mains voltage or generator power
Overload/ Over temperature/ short circuit protection

 is a powerful and intelligent energy storage inverter designed for residential, commercial, and remote off-grid solar applications. Developed by the globally recognized Solis brand, this inverter combines solar power generation, battery storage, and backup power management into a single efficient solution.

name: SAKO E-SUN 2KVA 12V Off Grid Hybrid Inverter
description:
SAKO E-SUN 2KVA 12V Off Grid Hybrid Inverter : The Ultimate Power Solution for Your Home in Bangladesh
Achieve True Energy Independence with the Best Solar IPS
In a market saturated with solar power solutions, the SAKO E-SUN 2KVA 12V Off Grid Hybrid Inverter stands out as a top-tier, all-in-one device perfectly tailored for the specific challenges and demands of the power landscape in Bangladesh. Rated at a robust 
2000VA / 1800W
, this intelligent hybrid inverter is the heart of a reliable energy system, designed to eliminate power disruptions and drastically reduce your electricity bills. It seamlessly combines three essential functions: a high-quality inverter, an advanced MPPT solar charge controller, and a smart utility battery charger. Whether you are setting up a new solar system or upgrading your existing backup solution, the SAKO E-SUN 2K offers a blend of performance, safety, and configurability that few competitors can match. When searching for the ideal 
Solar IPS Price in Bangladesh
, consider the long-term value and efficiency that this SAKO model delivers.
Revolutionary Efficiency with True MPPT Technology
The core differentiator of the SAKO E-SUN 2K is its built-in 
Maximum Power Point Tracking (MPPT) solar charge controller
. This technology is vital for extracting the absolute maximum energy from your solar panels, especially during periods of low light or fluctuating temperatures.
Maximized Solar Harvest:
 Unlike standard PWM (Pulse Width Modulation) chargers, the SAKO MPPT controller constantly tracks the most efficient operating point of the solar array, ensuring an industry-leading conversion efficiency of up to 98%. This high performance is crucial for users who wish to maximize their battery charge in the shortest time.
High Power Handling:
 The unit supports a maximum PV array power of 
2000W
, allowing you to connect a substantial solar panel setup. This is a significant advantage for users looking to power multiple essential appliances or charge their batteries quickly.
Wide Input Voltage Flexibility:
 The wide PV input voltage range, which can handle up to 
400 VDC
 open circuit voltage (with an MPPT operation range typically starting from 30VDC), provides immense flexibility in solar array design. This makes installation simpler and allows for optimal solar string sizing, ensuring you get the most out of your panels regardless of your rooftop configuration.
Pure Sine Wave Output: Power Quality You Can Trust
The output quality of your inverter directly impacts the lifespan and performance of your appliances. The SAKO E-SUN 2K guarantees a 
Pure Sine Wave
 output, delivering power that is cleaner and more stable than the utility grid itself.
Total Appliance Safety:
 This clean, consistent power is essential for sensitive electronics, including high-definition televisions, desktop computers, Wi-Fi routers, and medical equipment. Say goodbye to the annoying humming noise and potential damage caused by square-wave or modified sine wave inverters.
Robust Power Delivery:
 With a continuous output of 
1800W
, the inverter effortlessly powers your home essentials. Furthermore, its impressive surge power rating (up to 2000VA peak) handles the high instantaneous current required to start motor-type appliances like ceiling fans, refrigerators, and small air conditioners without tripping the system.

 Tailor your energy strategy to your needs. Easily set the battery charging current and choose the 
AC/Solar Charger Priority

Universal Power Source Compatibility:
 The inverter is fully compatible with both standard 
mains voltage
 and 
generator power
, ensuring that you have multiple options for backup charging when solar power is unavailable. It even includes an 
Auto Restart
 function after AC recovery, providing a completely hands-free operation.
Advanced Battery Compatibility:
 Equipped with a 
smart battery charger design
 for optimized performance, this unit supports all major battery chemistries, including traditional Flooded, AGM, and Gel batteries, and the increasingly popular, high-cycle

Built with quality and durability in mind, the SAKO E-SUN 2K incorporates crucial safety and monitoring features:
All-Around Protection:
 The inverter includes comprehensive safety measures, such as

, safeguarding both the unit and your connected loads against common electrical faults.
Optional Remote Monitoring:
 For tech-savvy users, the E-SUN 2K is ready for remote management. It supports connectivity via USB, RS232, and RS485 ports, and offers optional 
WIFI/GPRS monitoring
 accessories (sold separately) for checking system status and adjusting settings from your smartphone or PC.
Choose the SAKO E-SUN 2KVA 12V Off Grid Hybrid Inverter for a powerful, efficient, and reliable solar backup system. Invest in the best Solar IPS solution for your home in Bangladesh today!

name: Solis 18kW Single Phase Hybrid Inverter S6-EH1P18K03-NV-YD-L
description:
Solis 18kW Single Phase Hybrid Inverter S6-EH1P18K03-NV-YD-L
The 
Solis 18kW Single Phase Hybrid Inverter S6-EH1P18K03-NV-YD-L
 is Solis’ most powerful low-voltage single-phase hybrid inverter, designed for large residential properties, luxury villas, commercial buildings, offices, farms, factories, and high-capacity energy storage systems. Combining advanced hybrid inverter technology with intelligent battery management, this inverter seamlessly manages solar panels, batteries, utility power, and generators to maximize energy savings while ensuring uninterrupted electricity even during grid outages.
Supporting a 
recommended PV array size of 36kW
 and 
28.8kW maximum usable PV input
, the inverter extracts maximum energy from your solar panels throughout the day. Equipped with 
3 independent MPPT trackers
 and 
6 PV string inputs
, it delivers excellent performance even when solar panels are installed in different directions or under partial shading conditions. It also supports up to 
20A PV input current
, making it compatible with the latest high-power solar modules.
The 
Solis 18kW Single Phase Hybrid Inverter S6-EH1P18K03-NV-YD-L
 supports both 
Lithium-ion and Lead-acid batteries
 operating between 
40V and 60V
. With a maximum 
320A battery charge/discharge current
, it provides fast charging, efficient energy storage, and reliable backup for critical loads. Advanced battery management ensures longer battery life while allowing users to customize battery reserve levels according to their power requirements.
Designed for uninterrupted power, the inverter provides 
UPS-level switching in less than 10 milliseconds
, ensuring computers, medical equipment, networking devices, security systems, and other sensitive electronics continue operating without interruption. During off-grid operation, it supports 
200% overload for up to 10 seconds
, making it suitable for heavy inductive loads such as water pumps, air conditioners, compressors, and electric motors.
Generator compatibility provides additional flexibility, allowing automatic generator operation during extended power outages. The inverter also supports existing grid-tied PV systems, enabling cost-effective upgrades to hybrid energy storage without replacing current solar installations. Users can connect 
up to 6 inverters in parallel
, making future expansion simple and economical.
For intelligent monitoring, the inverter features a 
7-inch industrial-grade LCD touchscreen
, Bluetooth connectivity, and full integration with 
SolisCloud
, enabling users to monitor energy generation, battery status, load consumption, and system performance remotely through a smartphone or PC. AI-powered optimization and remote troubleshooting further enhance system reliability.
The inverter offers outstanding durability with an 
IP66-rated enclosure
, intelligent fan cooling, surge protection, reverse polarity protection, ground fault monitoring, and optional AFCI protection. With a 
maximum efficiency of 97.6%
, it delivers reliable, long-term performance in Bangladesh’s challenging climate.
Whether you are building a premium home solar system, commercial rooftop project, industrial backup solution, or agricultural solar installation, the 
Solis 18kW Single Phase Hybrid Inverter S6-EH1P18K03-NV-YD-L
 provides exceptional performance, smart energy management, and dependable backup power.
